# Customer Users

Operations related to customer users. Customers receive media from companies. Customer users represent real-estate agents, assistants, listing coordinators, and brokerage members.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/customer-team-members/{customer_team_member_id}` | Get customer team member. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/customer-teams/affiliate-memberships` | Create customer team affiliate membership. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/customer-teams/{customer_team_id}/memberships` | List customer team memberships. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/customer-users` | List customer users. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/customer-users` | Create customer user. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/customer-users/{user}/credit-transactions` | Store customer user credit transaction. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/customers` | List customers. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/customers` | Create a customer. | Bearer token required |

## `GET /customer-teams/{customer_team_id}/memberships`

List customer team memberships.

List customer team memberships.

- Operation ID: `customer-teams-customer-team-id-memberships-get`
- Authentication: Bearer token required

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `customer_team_id` | `path` | Yes | string (uuid) | The ID of a customer team. UUID Version 4. |
| `filter[search]` | `query` | No | string | The search query to filter the customer team memberships. |
| `filter[email_domains][]` | `query` | No | string | The email domains to filter the customer team memberships. |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | The field to sort the customer team memberships by. |
| `per_page` | `query` | No | integer | The number of customer team memberships to return per page. |
| `page` | `query` | No | integer | The page number to return. |

None.

| Status | Description | Content |

## `GET /customer-users`

List customer users.

List customer users.

- Operation ID: `customer-users-get`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `CustomerUserCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `include` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of optional data to include in the response. |
| `filter[exclude_customers_in_team]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by customer team ID. |
| `filter[exclude_customers_in_pricing_plan]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by pricing plan ID. |
| `filter[exclude_customers_with_individual_pricing_plan]` | `query` | No | boolean | Filter customers that do not have an individual pricing plan. |
| `filter[exclude_customers_with_team_pricing_plan]` | `query` | No | boolean | Filter customers that do not have a team pricing plan. |
| `filter[customer_team_ids]` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of customer team IDs. |
| `filter[has_active_team_memberships]` | `query` | No | boolean | Filter customers that have active team memberships. |
| `filter[search]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by search. |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of fields used for sorting. Placing a minus symbol in front of a field name sorts in descending order. Defaults to `-created_at`. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | CustomerUserCollection | `application/json`: `CustomerUserCollection` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |
| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |

## `GET /customers`

List customers.

List customers.

- Operation ID: `customers-get`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `GroupCustomerCollection`

### Parameters

| Name | In | Required | Schema | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `include` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of optional data to include in the response. |
| `filter[exclude_ids]` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of customer user IDs to exclude from the response. |
| `filter[email_domain]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by email domain. |
| `filter[search]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by search. |
| `filter[email]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by email. |
| `filter[phone]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by phone. |
| `filter[customer_team_ids]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by customer team IDs. |
| `filter[name]` | `query` | No | string | Filter customers by name. |
| `sort` | `query` | No | string | Comma separated list of fields used for sorting. Placing a minus symbol in front of a field name sorts in descending order. Defaults to `-created_at`. |

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `200` | GroupCustomerCollection | `application/json`: `GroupCustomerCollection` |
| `404` | ApiError404 | `application/json`: `ApiError404` |

| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |
